label: Severed Star Armory Stores
description: Severed Star Armory Stores occupies a blast-rated bay behind the Sanctum’s side chapels, its ferrocrete shell plated in void-black adamantine and sealed by a gasketed pressure door. Racked shelves and lock-cages line the walls in regimented runs, holding oil-skin wrapped reliquary cases, ration tins, and sanctified maintenance components under stencil-marked inventory plates. Decontamination grates and sump channels cut the floor, keeping the air dry and the surfaces free of ash-dust tracked from Cyrenth Bastion-City’s sealed arcades. Bruise-hued auroral light reaches the room only as a thin, ward-filtered band through a shuttered slit, leaving most of the space under steady lumen strips and vox-baffled quiet.
